title: Fragment: Rain.
content:
The fitful alternations of the rain,
    When the chill wind, languid as with pain
    Of its own heavy moisture, here and there
    Drives through the gray and beamless atmosphere.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Percy Bysshe Shelley, titled "Fragment: Rain.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
